notes: 2025 DfE statutory RSHE guidance (for introduction 1 September 2026). Full programme: primary relationships education (pages 8-13), secondary RSE (pages 14-20), primary health and wellbeing (pages 22-26), secondary health and wellbeing (pages 28-32). Implementation guidance (pages 33-41) and annexes (pages 42-47) excluded — not curriculum content. Source PDF is the same document used for secondary-rshe-2025 corpus; raw.pdf is not duplicated — referenced by path only.
